creator: ixkatl@yahoo.com
text:
This problem also appears to exist in current's ata
driver code.

From ata-disk.c:

if (adp->cylinders == 16383 &&
adp->total_secs < adp->ata_parm->lbasize) {
adp->total_secs = adp->ata_parm->lbasize;
adp->cylinders =
adp->total_secs/(adp->heads*adp->sectors);
}
